_comment: Per-product QA identities (PRODUCT_STANDARDS §9.5). Four accounts: two human-operator admins (NEVER handed to an agent), one QA admin-agent (drives VT_A1–A4 only), one QA user-agent (drives VT_B1–B5 incl. VT_B2 blocked-from-/admin check). INVARIANT: adminAgentEmail ∈ ADMIN_EMAILS; userAgentEmail ∉ ADMIN_EMAILS.
